companies-house.description: Companies House API — company search, officer details, PSC register, filing history, charges. Free API key from developer.company-information.service.gov.uk

hmrc-mtd.description: HMRC Making Tax Digital API — VAT obligations, returns, ITSA quarterly updates. OAuth 2.0 from developer.service.hmrc.gov.uk

land-registry.description: HM Land Registry — title searches, property data, ownership records. Business Gateway or portal access

legislation-gov-uk.description: legislation.gov.uk API — full text of UK Acts, Statutory Instruments, and secondary legislation

fca-register.description: FCA Financial Services Register — check firm/individual authorisation, permissions, and regulatory status

ico-register.description: ICO Data Protection Register — verify data protection fee registration and search the register

document-management.description: Document management system — iManage, NetDocuments, SharePoint, or Egnyte for storing and retrieving legal documents

practice-management.description: Legal practice management — Clio, LEAP, Smokeball, or PracticeEvolve for matter management, time recording, and billing

office-suite.description: Microsoft 365 or Google Workspace — Word/Docs for document drafting, Outlook/Gmail for correspondence, Teams/Chat for collaboration

slack.description: Slack — team communication, matter updates, and approval workflows
